title: IncomingMessage
description: Message delivered from connector to ChatEngine. The widget renders it via MessageTypeRegistry.get(type). Source: packages/core/src/domain/entities/Message.ts.

id.description: Unique id used for deduplication and event routing.

type.description: Registered message type. Built-in: text, image, card, buttons, quick-reply, carousel, file, video, genui.

from.description: Sender side. Defaults to bot when omitted.

data.description: Type-specific payload. Shape depends on `type`. See built-in schemas in schemas/messages/data/ for the canonical shapes.

actions.description: Optional quick-reply chips rendered below the bubble.
